chapter_title.en: What Allah (azwj) has Forbidden a Believer to do Against a Fellow Believer

text: 176 - وقال النبي صلى الله عليه وآله وسلم: من لا يعرف لأخيه مثل ما يعرف له فليس بأخيه.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 176. The Prophet (a.s) has said: One who does not care to know of his brother what he knows of him is not his brother.
